raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to you today regarding a serious issue of identity theft that has significantly impacted my financial standing and credit score. In the first week of XX/XX/year>, an unauthorized individual utilized my identity to open a Gap Rewards Card account under BARCLAYS. Upon discovering this fraudulent activity, I promptly contacted your company to report the unauthorized transaction. 

Following your initial investigation, I was unfortunately deemed responsible for the payment. I immediately challenged this finding, providing evidence in the form of my time card to demonstrate that I was at work during the time of the alleged purchase, thus proving I could not have made the transaction. After a subsequent three-month investigation, BARCLAYS ultimately concluded that I was not responsible for the payment, which I believed had resolved the matter.

However, my credit score has since declined, and I have begun receiving billing statements for the Gap Rewards Card, labeling me as delinquent for non-payment. Upon contacting Barclays again, I was informed that a reinvestigation was conducted in XX/XX/year> without any prior notification to me, either by phone or mail. I am currently awaiting the results of this latest investigation. 

I am a victim of identity theft, and the manner in which this situation has been handled by Barclays has been both unfair and frustrating. I urgently request your assistance in rectifying my credit report and resolving this matter definitively.
